title: argentina lineata subsp. exortiva
intro: Argentina lineata subsp. exortiva, also known as Chilean linearia or Linearia, is a plant species belonging to the Plantaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Argentina lineata subsp. exortiva typically involve infusions of the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas, applied topically as poultices, or used in ointments and salves.
